result.stdout:
Usage: [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Process audio files in a folder, prepending spoken labels.

Options:
  -f, --folder <string>       Folder containing audio files to process. [Required]
  -fe, --ffmpeg <string?>     Optional path to ffmpeg executable or its folder. [Default: null]
  -p, --provider <string>     TTS provider to use (speech or piper). [Default: @"speech"]
  -m, --model-key <string>    Piper model key (when provider is piper). [Default: @"en_GB-alan-medium"]
  -tr, --translit             Whether to transliterate file names before TTS.
  -r, --rate <int>            Speaking rate, from -10 to 10 [Default: 0]
